source.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection

en.title: How OpenAI Defends Agents Against Prompt Injection
en.description: OpenAI reveals how ChatGPT agents resist prompt injection attacks — constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in real time.

slides.headline: Your AI Agent Has a Backdoor
slides.body_text: And hackers already know how to use it.
slides.narration: What if someone could hijack your AI agent with a single sentence? It's called prompt injection — and it's one of the biggest unsolved problems in AI security.
slides.image_prompt: Dark futuristic terminal screen showing lines of code being manipulated by a red glowing cursor, hacker aesthetic, cinematic lighting, 16:9 widescreen

slides.headline: What Is Prompt Injection?
slides.body_text: Tricking AI into following hidden instructions
slides.narration: Prompt injection is when an attacker hides malicious instructions inside seemingly normal text. The agent reads it, treats it as a command, and does exactly what the attacker wants — send data, change behavior, or bypass safety filters.
slides.image_prompt: Split screen showing a clean email on the left and hidden malicious code revealed underneath on the right, digital forensics style, dark blue tones, 16:9

slides.headline: OpenAI's Defense Strategy
slides.narration: OpenAI's approach is different from what you might expect. Instead of just filtering bad prompts, they constrain what the agent can actually do. Every risky action — sending emails, accessing files, running code — requires explicit permission boundaries.
slides.image_prompt: Blueprint-style diagram showing an AI agent in the center surrounded by permission gates and security checkpoints, clean technical illustration, blue and white, 16:9

slides.headline: Sensitive Data Protection
slides.narration: ChatGPT agents now actively protect sensitive data inside workflows. If a prompt tries to extract personal information or API keys, the agent recognizes the pattern and refuses — even if the instruction looks legitimate on the surface.
slides.image_prompt: Digital vault door half-open with streams of data flowing inside, some data blocks marked with red lock icons being blocked, futuristic security concept, 16:9

slides.headline: Social Engineering vs AI
slides.body_text: Manipulation tactics that work on humans — and machines
slides.narration: The scariest part? Attackers don't need to write code. Social engineering techniques that trick humans work just as well on AI agents. Urgency, authority, emotional appeals — models fall for the same psychological tricks we do.
slides.image_prompt: Dramatic illustration of a puppet master controlling strings attached to a glowing AI brain, dark theatrical lighting, red and purple color scheme, 16:9

slides.headline: The Bigger Picture
slides.body_text: Agents are becoming autonomous — security must keep up
slides.narration: As AI agents get more autonomous — browsing the web, writing code, managing your inbox — the attack surface grows exponentially. OpenAI says this is just the beginning. Every agent developer needs to think about prompt injection from day one.
slides.image_prompt: Expanding network of interconnected AI agent nodes spreading across a digital landscape, some nodes glowing green (safe) and some red (vulnerable), aerial perspective, 16:9

slides.headline: What Can You Do?
slides.body_text: Build agents that verify, not just execute
slides.narration: The takeaway? If you're building AI agents, don't just trust the input. Constrain actions. Verify intent. Protect sensitive data by default. The era of autonomous AI is here — and so are the attacks. Stay sharp.
slides.image_prompt: Developer at a futuristic workstation with holographic security dashboards showing green checkmarks and shield icons, optimistic tech aesthetic, warm blue lighting, 16:9

zh.title: OpenAI 如何防禦 AI Agent 的 Prompt Injection 攻擊
zh.description: OpenAI 揭露 ChatGPT Agent 如何抵抗提示注入攻擊 — 限制高風險操作，即時保護敏感資料。

slides.headline: 你的 AI Agent 有後門
slides.body_text: 駭客早就知道怎麼用了
slides.narration: 如果有人只用一句話就能劫持你的 AI Agent？這叫做 Prompt Injection，提示注入攻擊，是目前 AI 安全最大的未解難題之一。
slides.image_prompt: Dark futuristic terminal screen showing lines of code being manipulated by a red glowing cursor, hacker aesthetic, cinematic lighting, 16:9 widescreen

slides.headline: 什麼是 Prompt Injection？
slides.body_text: 騙 AI 執行隱藏指令
slides.narration: 提示注入就是攻擊者把惡意指令藏在看似正常的文字裡。AI Agent 讀到後，會把它當成命令執行。發送資料、改變行為、繞過安全過濾，攻擊者要什麼就做什麼。
slides.image_prompt: Split screen showing a clean email on the left and hidden malicious code revealed underneath on the right, digital forensics style, dark blue tones, 16:9

slides.headline: OpenAI 的防禦策略
slides.body_text: 限制行為，而不只是過濾文字
slides.narration: OpenAI 的做法跟你想的不一樣。他們不只是過濾惡意提示，而是限制 Agent 能做的事。每個高風險操作，寄信、存取檔案、執行程式碼，都需要明確的權限邊界。
slides.image_prompt: Blueprint-style diagram showing an AI agent in the center surrounded by permission gates and security checkpoints, clean technical illustration, blue and white, 16:9

slides.headline: 敏感資料保護
slides.narration: ChatGPT Agent 現在會主動保護工作流中的敏感資料。如果提示試圖提取個人資訊或 API 金鑰，Agent 會辨識出這個模式並拒絕執行，即使指令表面上看起來完全合理。
slides.image_prompt: Digital vault door half-open with streams of data flowing inside, some data blocks marked with red lock icons being blocked, futuristic security concept, 16:9

slides.headline: 社交工程 vs AI
slides.body_text: 騙人的手法，騙 AI 一樣有效
slides.narration: 最可怕的是什麼？攻擊者根本不需要寫程式。那些用來騙人的社交工程技巧，對 AI Agent 一樣有效。緊迫感、權威感、情緒訴求，模型跟人類一樣會上當。
slides.image_prompt: Dramatic illustration of a puppet master controlling strings attached to a glowing AI brain, dark theatrical lighting, red and purple color scheme, 16:9

slides.headline: 更大的格局
slides.body_text: Agent 越自主，攻擊面越大
slides.narration: 隨著 AI Agent 越來越自主，瀏覽網頁、寫程式、管理你的信箱，攻擊面也在指數級增長。OpenAI 說這只是開始。每個 Agent 開發者從第一天就要考慮提示注入的問題。
slides.image_prompt: Expanding network of interconnected AI agent nodes spreading across a digital landscape, some nodes glowing green (safe) and some red (vulnerable), aerial perspective, 16:9

slides.headline: 你能做什麼？
slides.body_text: 打造會驗證的 Agent，不只是執行
slides.narration: 重點來了。如果你在開發 AI Agent，不要盲目信任輸入。限制行為、驗證意圖、預設保護敏感資料。自主 AI 的時代來了，攻擊也來了。保持警覺。
slides.image_prompt: Developer at a futuristic workstation with holographic security dashboards showing green checkmarks and shield icons, optimistic tech aesthetic, warm blue lighting, 16:9
